articles.title: FDA's Deadly Cover-Up: Child Deaths From COVID Vaccines Hidden From Public
articles.summary: The FDA orchestrated a systematic cover-up of pediatric deaths linked to COVID vaccines, suppressing safety data that could have saved lives. This exposé reveals how the agency buried reports and manipulated safety narratives to protect the vaccine rollout.

articles.title: Senator Johnson Exposes FDA's COVID Vaccine Injury Cover-Up as 'Largest Government Scandal'
articles.summary: Wisconsin Senator Ron Johnson directly accuses the FDA of concealing COVID vaccine injuries in what he calls the biggest government scandal of his lifetime. The agency's systematic suppression of adverse event data is finally being challenged at the highest levels.

articles.title: Big Agriculture Tries to Override 1,000+ State Laws With Stealth Farm Bill Rider
articles.summary: Industry lobbyists have slipped a dangerous rider into the Farm Bill that would nullify over 1,000 state laws protecting consumers from agricultural chemicals and GMOs. Dr. Meryl Nass exposes this corporate power grab that bypasses democratic oversight.

articles.title: Medical Overtreatment Epidemic: Why Less Medicine Could Save More Lives
articles.summary: Alan Cassels exposes how the medical establishment's 'more is better' philosophy drives unnecessary treatments, procedures, and prescriptions that harm patients. The suppressed truth about medical minimalism challenges the profit-driven healthcare model.

articles.title: Breakthrough: Scientists Map Hidden Gut-Brain Protein Craving Circuit
articles.summary: Researchers have discovered a previously unknown gut-brain network that controls protein cravings, potentially revolutionizing our understanding of nutrition and metabolism. This finding challenges mainstream dietary dogma about appetite control.

articles.title: Ozempic's Dark Secret: New Study Reveals Hidden Muscle Destruction
articles.summary: Dr. Mercola exposes suppressed research showing how Ozempic and similar GLP-1 drugs cause significant muscle loss alongside weight reduction. The pharmaceutical industry has downplayed these serious metabolic consequences.

articles.title: Neuroimaging Crisis: External Validation Exposes Massive Replication Failures
articles.summary: New research in Nature reveals that neuroimaging studies routinely fail when subjected to external validation, exposing a massive replication crisis in brain research. Decades of neuroscience findings may be fundamentally unreliable.

articles.title: Game-Changing Fatty Liver Drug ION224 Targets Root Cause Industry Ignored
articles.summary: UC San Diego researchers have developed ION224, an experimental drug that blocks the liver enzyme driving fatty liver disease progression. This metabolic approach challenges the pharmaceutical industry's symptom-focused treatments.

articles.title: Elsevier Nukes SIDS-Vaccine Study After It Threatens Official Narrative
articles.summary: Elsevier retracted Neil Z. Miller's 2021 study linking vaccines to sudden infant death syndrome, claiming concerns about 'patient care influence.' The single-author paper in Toxicology Reports was disappeared after challenging vaccine safety orthodoxy.

articles.title: Senator Johnson Exposes FDA's COVID Vaccine Cover-Up as 'Largest Government Scandal'
articles.summary: Wisconsin Senator Ron Johnson accused the FDA of deliberately concealing COVID vaccine injuries in what he called 'the largest government scandal in my lifetime.' Johnson demands accountability for the agency's systematic suppression of adverse event data.

articles.title: Big Pharma's Serotonin Hoax: How the Psychiatric Complex Manufactured Depression
articles.summary: The serotonin deficiency theory of depression was crafted by pharmaceutical companies in the 1980s to sell SSRIs, not discovered through science. A 2022 UCL meta-analysis found 'no consistent evidence' supporting the chemical imbalance myth that drugged millions.

articles.title: Texas Scientists Reverse Brain Aging With Simple Nasal Spray — No Pharma Strings
articles.summary: Texas A&M researchers developed a nasal spray that reverses brain aging by calming inflammation and restoring energy systems. Two doses improved memory and cognition for months, offering hope outside the pharmaceutical industrial complex.

articles.title: Scientists Discover Hidden Gut-Brain Circuit That Controls Protein Cravings
articles.summary: Researchers mapped a previously unknown gut-brain network that triggers protein cravings when the body runs low on amino acids. This discovery could transform understanding of nutritional signaling and challenge conventional dietary guidelines.

articles.title: Nature Admits Neuroimaging Crisis: External Validation Exposes Replication Disaster
articles.summary: Nature published a perspective promoting external validation for neuroimaging studies, tacitly acknowledging the field's replication crisis. The call for independent dataset validation reveals how much brain research has been unreproducible junk science.

articles.title: Farm Bill Rider Threatens to Override 1,000+ State Laws in Corporate Power Grab
articles.summary: An industry-friendly rider buried in the Farm Bill could override more than 1,000 state laws, representing a massive corporate power grab. Meryl Nass exposes how agribusiness is using federal legislation to crush local sovereignty and health protections.

articles.title: Medical Overtreatment Exposed: When Less Medicine Means Better Health
articles.summary: Alan Cassels challenges the medical establishment's 'more is better' philosophy, documenting how overtreatment harms patients while enriching the medical-industrial complex. The Brownstone analysis reveals systematic suppression of 'less is more' evidence in medicine.

articles.title: Nasal Spray Reverses Brain Aging While Big Pharma Ignores Simple Solutions
articles.summary: Texas A&M researchers developed a nasal spray that reverses brain aging by calming inflammation and restoring energy systems, with just two doses improving memory for months. This breakthrough challenges the pharmaceutical industry's complex, expensive approach to neurodegeneration while offering hope outside traditional drug development pipelines.

articles.title: Scientists Expose Hidden Gut-Brain Protein Circuit Big Food Doesn't Want You to Know
articles.summary: Researchers discovered a powerful gut-brain network that triggers protein cravings when the body runs low on amino acids, potentially explaining why processed food companies flood products with sugar instead of protein. This finding could transform understanding of nutritional manipulation by the food industry.

articles.title: Psychiatric Industrial Complex Manufactured Mental Health Epidemic With Fake Serotonin Theory
articles.summary: The serotonin deficiency theory of depression was crafted by pharmaceutical companies in the 1980s to sell SSRIs, not based on scientific discovery. A 2022 University College London meta-analysis found 'no consistent evidence' of serotonin deficiency causing depression, exposing decades of pharmaceutical deception.

articles.title: External Validation Crisis: Medical Research Built on House of Cards
articles.summary: Nature study reveals that neuroimaging research lacks external validation using independent datasets, undermining generalizability and reproducibility. This exposes the systemic failure of medical research institutions to ensure their studies can be replicated outside their own labs.

articles.title: Senator Johnson Exposes FDA Cover-Up of COVID Vaccine Injuries as 'Largest Government Scandal'
articles.summary: Wisconsin Senator Ron Johnson accuses the FDA of concealing COVID vaccine injuries, calling it 'the largest government scandal in my lifetime.' Johnson's allegations highlight systematic suppression of vaccine safety data by federal health agencies.

articles.title: Elsevier Retracts SIDS-Vaccine Study to Protect Pharma Narrative
articles.summary: Elsevier retracted Neil Z. Miller's 2021 study linking sudden infant death syndrome to vaccines, citing concerns it 'might influence patient care.' The retraction silences legitimate safety research that threatens the vaccine industry's liability-free business model.

articles.title: Farm Bill Rider Seeks to Override 1,000+ State Laws Protecting Food Safety
articles.summary: An industry-friendly provision buried in the Farm Bill threatens to override over 1,000 state laws protecting consumers from unsafe food practices. This corporate capture of federal legislation demonstrates how agribusiness uses backroom deals to eliminate local food safety protections.

articles.title: FDA Cover-Up: Child Deaths From COVID Vaccines Hidden From Public
articles.summary: Investigation reveals the FDA's systematic cover-up of child deaths linked to COVID vaccines, suppressing critical safety data that could have saved lives. This expose by Maryanne Demasi documents how federal agencies prioritized vaccine rollout over pediatric safety.

articles.summary: Researchers at Texas A&M developed a nasal spray that reverses brain aging in just two doses, improving memory for months by calming inflammation and restoring energy systems. Watch how fast the pharmaceutical industry moves to suppress, patent-trap, or price this breakthrough out of reach.

articles.title: Pharma's Serotonin Lie Exposed — Depression Drug Empire Built on Fraud
articles.summary: The psychiatric industrial complex manufactured the serotonin deficiency theory in the late 1980s to sell SSRIs, not from science. A 2022 UCL meta-analysis found zero evidence for serotonin depression theory, yet millions remain drugged on this fabricated foundation.

articles.title: Neuroimaging's Replication Crisis — Most Brain Studies Are Statistical Junk
articles.summary: Nature publishes damning perspective showing neuroimaging studies lack external validation, making results unreproducible. Decades of brain research built on statistical quicksand while journals publish feel-good neuroscience that can't be replicated.

articles.title: Senator Johnson: FDA Concealed COVID Vaccine Deaths — 'Largest Government Scandal'
articles.summary: Wisconsin Senator Ron Johnson accuses FDA of hiding COVID vaccine injuries, calling it the largest government scandal of his lifetime. The regulatory capture machine continues protecting pharmaceutical profits over public safety.

articles.summary: Researchers found how the gut signals the brain for specific amino acids, potentially revolutionizing understanding of nutrition and cravings. This gut-brain network threatens the processed food empire built on sugar addiction.

articles.summary: Maryanne Demasi documents the FDA's systematic concealment of child deaths linked to COVID vaccines. The agency buried safety signals while pushing shots on kids who faced minimal COVID risk but maximum vaccine harm.
